title: Hydogon doubles attack damage to creatures near fire

card.rawText: This creature inflicts 2x Atk damage to any creature in or near fire.

effect.value: This creature inflicts 2x Atk damage to any creature in or near fire.

plan.title: Hydogon doubles attack damage to creatures near fire
plan.summary: Run Hydogon through battle and verify whether the 2x near-fire attack damage multiplier is represented.

notes: Read text first: This creature inflicts 2x Atk damage to any creature in or near fire.
Treat the target as in or near fire for this focused headless route.

steps: Start battle with Hydogon as attacker.
Resolve deterministic hit and attack damage.
Inspect for a 2x attack damage multiplier.
manualVerification: The environmental fire condition likely needs explicit runtime state if this fails.
